_note: A dotted component tag whose root identifier is unresolved must surface the engine's error instead of silently passing. The component name in the synthesized __svn_ensure_component(...) call was only source-mapped for simple identifiers; dotted names had no token-map entry, so the TS2304/2552 at the root (or the TS2339 at a member, like Body on the DOM Text constructor here) mapped to nothing and was dropped as synthesized scaffolding. The dotted name and its source span are equal-length, so the token map translates member-anchored positions byte-exactly — the 2339 lands on `Body`, matching upstream.
